input: <SYNTHETIC: malicious npm shim tarball whose SHA-256 does not match the committed integrity hash in npm/package.json>
reference: PLAN-013 Phase E.7 §NPM sync with SHA-256+GPG+SLSA; consensus §S2
notes: NPM shim install must verify SHA-256 + GPG sig + SLSA Level-2 provenance before proceeding. Mismatch = abort install with clear error.
